name: Chanti Sakinala
aboutMe: I am a Computer Science & Engineering student with a strong interest in software development, web technologies, and system-level programming. I am passionate about building efficient problem-solving applications, having worked on projects ranging from web-based dashboards to voice-controlled systems using Python.

training.title: Basics of DSA
highlights: Completed a hands-on summer training program gaining strong foundational knowledge in problem-solving and algorithms.
Explored core DSA modules including Arrays, Searching, Sorting, and Time Complexity Analysis.
Worked on hands-on coding implementations that strengthened logical thinking and structured problem-solving skills.
Crafted a complete front-end workflow for citizens and municipal staff, including real-time dashboard stats and priority-based bin classification.

projects.title: Smart Waste Bin Collection
projects.description: Built a front-end workflow using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and local storage. Developed a citizen-reporting module, implemented merge sort logic to rank waste bins by fill level, and designed a municipal dashboard for real-time tracking and prioritization.

projects.title: Voice Process Manager
projects.description: Created a Voice Process Manager in Python to manage system processes through voice commands. Integrated speech recognition, command parsing, and robust error-handling mechanisms. Optimized to work seamlessly on macOS with a future scope for Windows.

achievements.title: Problem Solving Badge
